evaluators.name: Most Recent DevOps Kubernetes CI/CD Project Title Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the recruiter evaluation points to the most recently updated DevOps project using Kubernetes and CI/CD, and that its title is copied into the evaluation field.

evaluators.name: Microservices Contact Message Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that a contact message was sent which mentions two qualifying microservices projects (Go or Node.js backend) and includes a parsable preferred interview date, with the expected email and subject.

evaluators.name: AWS DevOps/Cloud Skills Shortlist Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the skill shortlist contains up to exactly three AWS-related skills in DevOps or Cloud categories with proficiency >= 4, and no non-qualifying skills.

evaluators.name: DevOps Reading List Short and Long Post Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the reading list contains one recent DevOps post with reading time <= 7 minutes and one recent DevOps post with reading time >= 12 minutes.

evaluators.name: Earliest DevOps/SRE Year Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the recruiter evaluation contains the correct earliest start year among all DevOps and SRE roles in the experience timeline.

evaluators.name: Terraform on AWS Production Project Comparison Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the project comparison selection includes the two most recently started production projects that use Terraform on AWS, and no older qualifying Terraform-on-AWS production projects.

evaluators.name: Senior DevOps Germany Resume Configuration Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the tailored resume configuration targets a Senior DevOps role in Germany, uses the last 4 years of experience, highlights CI/CD and Observability, and sets the remote preference correctly.

evaluators.name: Weekly DevOps & Cloud Newsletter Subscription Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks that the user has an active weekly newsletter subscription selecting DevOps and Cloud topics, using a work (non-personal) email.
